title: lathyrus nissolia var. gramineus
intro: Lathyrus nissolia var. gramineus, also known as the grassy pea or Italian lathyrus, is a plant species of the genus Lathyrus and a variety of the Lathyrus nissolia species, characterized by its grass-like appearance. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus nissolia var. gramineus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to act as an antispasmodic and diuretic. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is often used in folk medicine, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
